title: 10 best herbal tinctures for hyperacidity
description: Damask rose tinctures helps with hyperacidity because of its unique ability to soothe and calm the digestive tract. The antispasmodic properties in damask rose help to relax the muscles in the stomach, reducing inflammation and discomfort associated with acid reflux. Additionally, the herb's anti-inflammatory compounds work to reduce the production of excess stomach acid, promoting a healthy balance in the gut and alleviating symptoms of hyperacidity.
